title: pittosporum verticillatum subsp. pangalanense
intro: Pittosporum verticillatum subsp. pangalanense is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Pittosporum verticillatum subsp. pangalanense include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its analgesic and expectorant properties. Pittosporum verticillatum subsp. pangalanense is traditionally prepared as a tea or decoction from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
